report.summary: No-delta cycle — zero commits since Mar 17 (Day 64); all 414 pages published; 3 carry-over engineering items unchanged (defi-yields fallback, JSX escaping, cache header consistency); site stable and idle.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 414 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 412 unique slugs parsed; 103 slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged — these are pre-scaffolded future pages)
Publish queue: EMPTY — all planned pages promoted; PUBLISH_QUEUE reference count is 3 (export + comments only)

Known JSX issue persists: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx line 518 — unescaped > in string literal ('>$1M', '>$200K') inside JSX; low severity since ignoreBuildErrors:true bypasses this on Vercel
No new commits since e999560 (Mar 17) — zero regression risk this cycle
Live site HTTP verification blocked by egress proxy — cannot confirm 200s from this environment
TypeScript full check (tsc --noEmit) timed out in sandbox — expected for 826+ page project; no new code to introduce errors

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko markets, 60s TTL, stale cache fallback on failure ✓, X-Cache-Source header present ✓
/api/trending — CoinGecko trending, 300s TTL, stale cache fallback on failure ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, stale cache fallback on failure ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + fear-greed, 60s TTL, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (inconsistent naming)
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, FALLBACK_DATA constant + stale cache ✓, X-Cache-Source present ✓ (best pattern)
CARRY-OVER: /api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, 300s TTL, NO in-memory cache, NO fallback data — returns 500 on upstream failure
Correction from prior report: trending and fear-greed DO have stale-cache fallback (return cached data on catch) — only defi-yields truly lacks any fallback

sections.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items: Latest deploy: commit e999560 (Day 64 publish, Mar 17) — no new deploys since; 5 days idle
next.config: standalone output, trailingSlash, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false — unchanged
Middleware: Edge-compatible, PILLAR_PAGES inlined (50 pages), security headers present (X-DNS-Prefetch, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy)
Static assets: Cache-Control immutable with 1yr max-age on _next/static — correct
Image optimization: AVIF + WebP formats, 24hr minimum cache TTL — correct
No vercel.json — configuration via next.config.ts and Vercel dashboard (normal)
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from this environment — egress proxy blocks outbound HTTP

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing — no activity since Day 64 publish on Mar 17 (5 days ago)
Publish queue: EMPTY — all 414 pages promoted. Next pages require new content scaffolding
Carry-over (high): Add fallback data to /api/defi-yields — only API route that returns 500 on upstream failure
Carry-over (medium): Add X-Cache-Source headers to /api/trending and /api/fear-greed for observability consistency
Carry-over (medium): Fix market-metrics to use X-Cache-Source instead of X-Cache for header naming consistency
Carry-over (low): Fix unescaped string in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx line 518
Carry-over (low): Rename structured-data.examples.ts to .tsx or exclude from tsconfig
No blockers requiring Jefe's attention — site is stable but idle; recommend planning next content sprint or addressing the carry-over engineering debt
